environment: Visual Studio 2026, C#, ASP.NET Core (net10.0), Docker, PostgreSQL
ui_views: Layout: top navigation with Week, Users, Tasks, Meals, Availability; header shows Household Planner + Weekly label; theme toggle button in header.
Page: Week (Index) dashboard with HTMX-based health check button.
Page: Users list with CRUD actions (name, color, sort order, active flag); table now readable in light mode with neutral styling.
Page: Users Create form with validation, CSRF, color picker + hex sync; inputs styled for both light and dark backgrounds.
Page: Users Edit form with validation, CSRF, color picker + hex sync; inputs styled for both light and dark backgrounds.
Page: Users Delete confirmation with CSRF-protected POST; details panel styled as a neutral/danger panel for both themes.
Page: Tasks list with CRUD actions (name, description, assignee, priority, deadline, subtask summary); table styled for light mode with clear badges.
Page: Tasks Create form with validation and CSRF (name, description, optional assignee, priority, deadline); inputs styled for both themes.
Page: Tasks Edit form with validation, CSRF, inline HTMX assignee change, and subtasks list with HTMX toggle-done and add-subtask; inputs styled for both themes.
Page: Tasks Delete confirmation with CSRF-protected POST and neutral/danger panel styling.
Page: Meals placeholder view (Create/Index) with neutral panel and light/dark-safe text.
Page: Availability management view (Index) with form-select semantic styling, recurring weekly slot creation, table listing, and delete actions; fully light/dark theme–compliant.
Page: Debug/Seed Razor Page with button to trigger manual seeding and show basic counts.

Week dashboard sidebar: reusable 'Tasks this week' summary panel using shared panel/panel-body and semantic typography classes, grouping overdue, due-this-week, and unassigned tasks with links to task edit view.
decisions_log: Runtime: .NET 10 (TFM net10.0)
DB: PostgreSQL via Npgsql EF Core provider
Container: Kestrel on port 8080;app runs in Docker
Auth: none (household trust model)
UI Framework: Razor Pages + HTMX (lightweight, touch-friendly)
Styling: Tailwind v4.2.1 CSS with dark and light mode
Calendar: custom week-grid + availability overlays
Time: store DateTime in UTC; render local; week starts Monday
Tailwind CLI v4 configured manually using @import "tailwindcss"; content paths set for Razor Pages
EF Core + Npgsql installed; dotnet-ef configured
Docker: Multi-stage Dockerfile implemented; GHCR workflow confirmed
Compose: postgres + app services; persistent NAS volumes; running successfully on Ugreen DXP4800
Health checks: /healthz and /healthz/db ready
Base layout & navigation implemented and verified on kiosk resolution
TaskSchedule uses Date + StartLocalTime + AmountOfTime
MealPlan stores dinners per date; tags support content/prep-time/season/weather
EF migrations reset into a single InitialFullSchema baseline for a clean dev database; migrations auto-apply on startup
Seeding moved to /debug/seed Razor Page
User SortOrder implemented; color picker with synchronized hex box on Users Create/Edit pages
Tasks module: priority enum (Low/Normal/High/Critical), Deadline uses DateOnly, assignments via HTMX; CRUD pages wired to PlannerDbContext
Subtask relationship modeled via PlannerTaskId foreign key with cascade delete; subtasks toggled via HTMX and created on the Task Edit page
Tasks Edit page Save button now returns to tasks overview after successful save

Global layout updated: header now includes a theme toggle button, and the navigation links and main pages have been restyled for better readability in light mode; dark-mode styling is still being rationalized toward a custom theme-light/theme-dark approach.

Users, Tasks, Meals, Availability, and root dashboard views updated to remove hard-coded dark-only colors and use neutral/light defaults so that light mode is readable; dark mode currently follows a mix of existing Tailwind dark utilities and in-progress theme classes.
P2.3 completed: optimized Tailwind v4 theme system, unified light/dark approach, toggle persistence, removal of dark-only hard-coded colors.
P2.4 completed: Weekly task summary implemented as a sidebar panel on the Week view, with overdue, due-this-week, and unassigned groups; uses Monday–Sunday alignment and accurate counts.

Tailwind semantic theme system established: Components must use shared classes (panel, panel-body, page-title, text-muted, badge, action-link, table, table-wrap, btn, btn-primary, btn-secondary). Hardcoded palette utilities (bg-*, text-slate-*, dark:bg-*) are disallowed; all UI must rely on semantic classes defined in step P2.3.
P3.1 completed: availability management implemented with create/list/delete, semantic form-select styling added, and UserId foreign key corrected with proper EF Core mapping.
open_questions: Meal suggestion constraints (e.g., avoid same protein 2 days in a row)?

Finalize the global color scheme and theme system: align all pages on either Tailwind media-based dark mode or custom theme-light/theme-dark classes, and ensure tables/panels fully adapt in both modes.
